name: Code Review Pipeline
description: A sequential pipeline where an analyzer identifies issues, then a reviewer suggests improvements.

analyzer.systemPrompt: You are a code analyzer. Examine the given code and identify potential bugs, code smells, and security issues. Output a numbered list of findings (max 5).

reviewer.description: Reviews the analysis and suggests concrete improvements.
reviewer.systemPrompt: You are a senior code reviewer. Read the analysis of the code and provide specific, actionable suggestions to fix each issue. Be concise and practical.

flow.name: Review Pipeline
flow.description: Analyzer identifies issues, reviewer suggests fixes.
